creator: qingfeng@me.com
text:
# This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
# this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
# create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
# have default permissions.
#
# This archive contains:
#
#	py-scrapy
#	py-scrapy/Makefile
#	py-scrapy/distinfo
#	py-scrapy/pkg-descr
#	py-scrapy/pkg-plist
#
echo c - py-scrapy
mkdir -p py-scrapy > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x - py-scrapy/Makefile
sed 's/^X//' >py-scrapy/Makefile << 'END-of-py-scrapy/Makefile'
X# New ports collection makefile for:    py-scrpy
X# Date created:                         10 Jul 2009
X# Whom:                                 Qing Feng <qingfeng@me.com>
X#
X# $FreeBSD$
X#
X
XPORTNAME=	scrpy
XPORTVERSION=	0.8
XCATEGORIES=	www python
XMASTER_SITES=	http://hg.scrapy.org/scrapy/archive/
XPKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
XDISTNAME=	tip
XEXTRACT_SUFX=	.zip
X
XMAINTAINER=	qingfeng@me.com
XCOMMENT=	Scrapy is a high level scraping and web crawling framework for writing spiders to crawl and parse web pages for all kinds of purposes, from information retrieval to monitoring or testing web sites.
X
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/twisted:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-twistedCore
XBUILD_DEPENDS=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/libxml2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/py-libxml2
X#LIB_DEPENDS=    xml2:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/libxml2
XRUN_DEPENDS=	${BUILD_DEPENDS}
XWRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/scrapy-963e6fd4c371
X
XUSE_PYTHON=		yes
XUSE_PYDISTUTILS=	yes
X
X.include <bsd.port.mk>
END-of-py-scrapy/Makefile
echo x - py-scrapy/distinfo
sed 's/^X//' >py-scrapy/distinfo << 'END-of-py-scrapy/distinfo'
XMD5 (tip.zip) = 6277b2273198c4eef94dd2d8f22ee4b8
XSHA256 (tip.zip) = 9607244366e20d0aa4e1a3acdcc2693634e503d46df97b87b52904dece5e0249
XSIZE (tip.zip) = 855904
END-of-py-scrapy/distinfo
echo x - py-scrapy/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' >py-scrapy/pkg-descr << 'END-of-py-scrapy/pkg-descr'
XScrapy is a high level scraping and web crawling framework for writing spiders to crawl and parse web pages for all kinds of purposes, from information retrieval to monitoring or testing web sites.
X
XWWW:	http://scrapy.org/
END-of-py-scrapy/pkg-descr
echo x - py-scrapy/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' >py-scrapy/pkg-plist << 'END-of-py-scrapy/pkg-plist'
